tool.name: regex_tester
tool.description: Test regex patterns for ReDoS vulnerabilities.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Test if regex patterns are vulnerable to ReDoS - Analyze pattern for catastrophic backtracking - Benchmark pattern with increasing input lengths - Identify evil regex patterns - Get remediation recommendations

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action: - test: Test pattern against input and check for issues - analyze: Comprehensive pattern analysis - benchmark: Benchmark pattern with increasing input lengths

tool.examples:
# Test pattern for vulnerabilities
test (a+)+ aaaaaaaaaa
# Comprehensive analysis
analyze (a+)+
# Benchmark pattern
benchmark (a+)+ 25
